items.name: Pierced Lips with Ring
items.description:
Silver lip piercing with dangling ring – high-quality mouth accessory featuring a realistic double labret-style piercing and subtle shine. Perfect fit on all avatars (R15, R6, Rthro) with zero clipping. Adds instant Y2K, emo, punk, alt, or soft goth edge to any face. Works great with any skin tone and pairs perfectly with braces, grillz, or layered face accessories. One of the cleanest lip ring UGC pieces available right now.
